title: Polluted Rain
description: Random things fall out of the sky!
body:
# **A customizable server-side mod that makes random things appear in the sky!**

This was inspired by the potions and arrows that appear in ominous trial chambers, except now they appear on the surface, and could be anything from a creeper to a mace!
![A chicken floating in the sky.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b28ebc612df2f5abd18fffd7c58f442d3aabf368_0.webp)
**IMPORTANT: This mod will not save settings between sessions.** An always-on server is fine, but after relogging from a singleplayer world you will have to start the game and change the settings again. This could be fixed in the future, so keep an eye out!

## _**Commands**_
- **/polluted-rain start:**
    >   Starts the flow of things falling from the sky.
- **/polluted-rain stop:**
    >   Stops the game.
  
- **/polluted-rain setting:**
    >   **minTicksUntilNextRain:** The minimum amount of server ticks until the next rain.
  
    _Default: 200_
    >  **maxTicksUntilNextRain:** The maximum amount of server ticks until the next rain.
  
    _Default: 600_
  
    >   **rainOnAllPlayers:** Whether all players should get the rain or just a random one.
  
    _Default: False_
  
    >   **shouldSpawnMobs:** Whether mobs are allowed to spawn from the rain.
  
    >   **shouldSpawnBlocks:** Whether falling blocks are allowed to spawn from the rain.
  
    >   **shouldSpawnItems:** Whether items are allowed to spawn from the rain.
  
    _Defualt (for all): True_
